## Summary

Describe the recommendation or product change.

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run validate:rules`
- [ ] `npm run validate:tasks` when task pages changed
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] New or changed signal patterns include a source or rationale
- [ ] New or changed task archetypes include related slugs and SEO fields
- [ ] Recommendation changes include or update a classifier test case
- [ ] UI copy stays aligned with BRAND.md and SPEC.md
